text: I am the Evolution Scholar of Kranix. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Infernal Titan into Shadow Phoenix.
I can evolve Shadow Phoenix into Shadow Drake.
I can evolve Solar Drake into Void Golem.
I can evolve Void Golem into Mystic Serpent.
I can evolve Ancient Tiger into Crystal Griffin.
I can evolve Crystal Griffin into Celestial Hydra.
I can evolve Celestial Basilisk into Void Basilisk.

I can evolve Crystal Specter into Celestial Djinn.
I can evolve Frozen Cyclops into Frozen Manticore.
I can evolve Frozen Manticore into Frozen Phoenix.
I can evolve Lunar Leviathan into Ancient Titan.
I can evolve Ancient Titan into Astral Cyclops.
I can evolve Astral Manticore into Astral Wyvern.
I can evolve Astral Wyvern into Wild Hydra.
I can evolve Lunar Manticore into Celestial Wolf.
I can evolve Celestial Wolf into Ancient Leviathan.
I can evolve Wild Phoenix into Void Serpent.
I can evolve Void Serpent into Ancient Phoenix.
I can evolve Astral Serpent into Shadow Hydra.

I can evolve Thunder Titan into Infernal Cyclops.
I can evolve Void Owlbear into Void Owlbear.
I can evolve Void Owlbear into Wild Chimera.
Choose a beast evolution.
